text:
EXPLANATION: The paper "Robust watermarking for diffusion models: A unified multi-dimensional recipe" is a real conference submission (under review at ICLR 2025). The cited author list matches the author list found in an arXiv paper that cites this work.
LINK: https://openreview.net/forum?id=O13fIFEB81
FOUND_TITLE: Robust Watermarking for Diffusion Models: A Unified Multi-Dimensional Recipe
FOUND_AUTHORS: Tianxin Wei, Ruizhong Qiu, Yifan Chen, Yunzhe Qi, Jiacheng Lin, Wenju Xu, Sreyashi Nag, Ruirui Li, Hanqing Lu, Zhengyang Wang, Chen Luo, Hui Liu, Suhang Wang, Jingrui He, Qi He, Xianfeng Tang
FOUND_YEAR: 2024
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
